prestazioni: Engine swap to a **2.0L Beta II (G4GC)** with forged internals (Manley forged pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** running 1.2 bar of boost on a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU**, achieving 320whp on E85 with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors**

Full **KW Clubsport 3-way coilover suspension** with adjustable camber plates, **SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms)**, and a **Cusco 2-point strut brace** for chassis rigidity

Drivetrain upgrades including a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD**, **PPG 1.5-way 6-speed dog engagement gearset**, **Spec Stage 3+ clutch**, and **Nexen N’Fera SU1 225/40R18 tires** on **Enkei PF07 18x8.5 ET35 wheels** with **Project Kics R40 5x114.3 lug nuts**
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and custom carbon fiber rear diffuser) with **Seibon carbon fiber hood** and **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap**

**Hyundai Coupe FX-specific JDM-style front bumper** (replica of the 2005-2008 facelift model with integrated **DRLs from LUX H8 V4 LED pods**) and **custom rear bumper with integrated dual 3.5" exhaust outlets** (using **Borla Pro XS 2.5" cat-back system**)

**OMP HTE-R carbon fiber bucket seats** with **Sabelt 6-point harnesses**, **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub**, and **custom aluminum gauge pod** housing **Defi Advance BF gauges (boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR)**
